text:
(copy to Jonathan, maintainer)

Hi everybody,

working for a par2cmdline-tbb port (see
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=120462), here is a patch including a
fix for the 'Main packet error' above *and* a CONFLICT for the new -tbb port.

Best regards,

Ganaël LAPLANCHE
